name: kola-marketplace
description: Plugins for Kola (getkola.app) — the AI-native people-memory layer. Drives Kola's local MCP server with workflow skills for meeting prep, network search, contact capture, list management, and custom-field schema design.

plugins.name: kola
plugins.description: Use Kola from Claude Code — brief yourself before a meeting, search your network by who-knows-what, capture new contacts as you meet them, organize people into lists, and shape your per-install custom-field schema. Talks to the Kola desktop app's local MCP server.
